title: Ming Foundation RFC Acceptance Test Registry

authority.registry_role: Test specification index; does not prove execution or conformance

tests.title: Conformance test for RFC-0001-R001
preconditions: A named target and immutable revision are selected.
The relevant data, user flow, policy, or repository surface is available under authorized scope.
Restricted evidence handling is defined where applicable.
procedure: Read the governing text in RFC-0001, section 2. Core rule.
Construct or identify a representative positive, negative, and boundary case.
Execute verification method: schema_review.
Execute verification method: record_trace.
Record observed behavior, evidence references, limitations, and counterexamples.
tests.expected_result: The behavior described by RFC-0001-R001 is present and produces traceable evidence.
